description: Eleanor Ruth Vásquez — 2025-04-22 subsequent AWV with three billing errors submitted: 99397 (Medicare non-covered), 99214 missing modifier 25, G2211 excluded with AWV codes. Agent must remove bad codes, substitute G0439, add modifier 25, add omitted 96127, and reject G2211.

error_1.reason: Medicare does not cover CPT preventive medicine codes 99381-99397. Correct code for subsequent AWV is G0439.
error_1.citation: CMS Medicare Benefit Policy Manual Ch.18 §10

error_2.reason: E&M billed same day as AWV G-code requires modifier 25 to identify it as separately identifiable. Without modifier 25 Medicare bundles the E&M into the AWV and denies it.

error_3.reason: G2211 visit complexity add-on is excluded when AWV codes G0438 or G0439 are present on the same claim per CMS policy.

error_4.reason: PHQ-9 administered, scored (score 3), and documented in clinical note. Code was omitted from submitted claim. Separately billable with documentation.
error_4.citation: CPT 96127 — Brief emotional/behavioral assessment with scoring

metadata.regression_notes: Primary AI Factor demo case. Agent must demonstrate: (1) wrong-code detection and substitution, (2) modifier correction, (3) excluded-code removal, (4) omitted-code recovery — all in one encounter. Any miss on G2211 removal or 96127 recovery is a demo-day failure.
